corpus: QuALITY validation (virgin — never used in dev)
metric_note: ARTICLE-level retrieval: gold = the source article the question was written for; hit@k of that article id among top-k sources. Declared limit: article-level not passage-level (no gold span; passage correctness needs an LLM judge, not called). whole vs chunked isolates the S2 silent-truncation fall.
